calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Mar-23-27 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Mitchell Wong, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to June 16, 2026, at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Upon further review, the Court vaccates the Order to Show Cause scheduled for June 16, 2026, and re-sets the matter for March 23, 2027, at 10:30am in Department 610. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Continued To Apr-14-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
